summary: Live PR inventory shard only. Four hydrated refs are independent open pull requests with no shared canonical. PR #91346 is routed to central security handling because the deterministic validator flagged it as security-sensitive; no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is safe or allowed from this job.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive PR is out of scope for ProjectClownfish inventory cleanup. Route this exact PR to central OpenClaw security handling and do not close, merge, label, comment on, or open a fix PR for it.
Independent large compatibility/availability PR needing normal maintainer judgment. It is not eligible for closeout, and merge/fix actions are blocked by job policy.
Independent PR with failing checks and waiting-on-author status. Failing checks block merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout but do not justify closing it in this inventory shard.
Independent contributor PR with useful code and waiting-on-author/review-bot context. It is not a duplicate or low-signal closeout target, and replacement/fix work is not allowed.
Independent auth-provider compatibility PR requiring normal maintainer technical judgment. It is not a closeout candidate, and merge/fix actions are blocked by job policy.
